items.name: Nanny Placement
items.tagline: Find the perfect nanny for your family.
items.description: Full-service nanny placement including consultation, candidate search, interviews, paid trial, and placement. Registration fee $250, placement fee is 4 weeks of agreed salary.

items.name: Babysitting Placement
items.description: Placement of up to 2 vetted babysitters for on-call family needs. Additional sitters available for $50 each. Maximum 4 sitters per family.

items.name: Dog Walker / Dog Sitter
items.tagline: Trusted care for your furry family member.
items.description: Experienced, background-checked dog walkers and sitters. Flexible scheduling tailored to your dog's needs. One-time registration fee, ongoing rates agreed directly with the professional.

items.name: Errand Runner / Home Organizer
items.tagline: More time for what matters most.
items.description: Errand running and home organization including grocery shopping, dry cleaning, decluttering, and storage solutions. One-time registration fee, ongoing rates agreed directly with the professional.
